sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n7009" key="a)naminuri/zw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀναμινῠρίζω</orth>, <sense id="n7009.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">sing languishingly,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1636.tlg001:2" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Protagorid.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
